C/C FOR SETTLMENT CONF. IN ROOM 503A. PRO TEM JUDGE, BRANDEN BICKEL. D. CARTER, CLERK. DIANA PADILLA, CSR. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION OF PREMISE IN FAVOR OF PLTF. AND AGAINST DEFT. TERMS ON THE COURT RECORD. SEE ALSO CLERK MINUTES.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PENA, ARMANDO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1112 LARKEN STREET APARTMENT 605 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL MAY-31-1999, LEASE FORFEITED, BACK RENT AND DAMAGES WAIVED BY PLTF. PLTF. PAYS $5,000.00 RELOCATION EXPENSE IN TWO INSTLMTS OF $2,500.00 EACH. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN ATTY. FEES AND COST. PLTF. TO SEEK EX-PARTE APPLICATION TO VACATE JDGMT. ON OR BEFORE 6/30/99 IF ALL TERMS COMPLIED WITH. (SEE JUDGMT. AT LENGTH)
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
